question: What is your full legal name as it appears on your passport?
tooltip: Enter your name exactly as it appears on your Canadian passport, including any middle names. This must match the DS-160 precisely.

question: Have you ever used any other names?
tooltip: Include maiden names, nicknames, or names in other languages.

options.label: Yes — I have used other names
No — I have never used other names

question: What is your date of birth?
tooltip: You must be 18 or older to apply for an E-2 visa. If you are under 18, an advisory will be shown.

question: What is your place of birth? (City and Country)
tooltip: Enter the city and country exactly as it appears on your passport.

question: What is your country of citizenship?
tooltip: This is the country of your nationality. For E-2 visa, you must be a citizen of a treaty country.

warningTriggers.message: Canadian citizens are eligible for E-2 visa through the U.S.-Canada treaty.

question: Do you hold citizenship in any other country?
tooltip: E-2 treaty investors may hold dual citizenship. Additional nationalities may require extra documentation.

options.label: Yes — I am a citizen of another country
No — I am only a citizen of Canada

question: What is your national identification number? (Canadian SIN or equivalent)
tooltip: If you have a Social Insurance Number (SIN), enter it here. This is for record-keeping only and is not submitted to the consulate.

question: What is your U.S. Social Security Number or Taxpayer ID?
tooltip: Most first-time E-2 applicants will not have a U.S. SSN. Leave blank if this is your first U.S. visa application.

question: What is your current home address in Canada?
tooltip: Enter your full Canadian address including street, city, province, and postal code.

question: How long have you lived at this address?
tooltip: The consulate may request proof of residence history. Longer residence strengthens your Canadian ties.

question: What is your primary phone number?
tooltip: Include country code for Canadian numbers: +1

question: What is your email address?
tooltip: This will be used for all communication regarding your application. Pre-filled from your account if available.
